      Hotel Services

      Carpet Cleaning

      We’ve deep cleaned more hotel carpet than anyone over the past three decades, using well-tested proprietary machines and unique, private-blended chemicals.

      Tile and Grout Restoration

      We provide sophisticated hard-surface maintenance, using powerful cleaning equipment plus our exclusive blend of hotel hygiene chemicals.

      Kitchen Cleaning

      Reduce food-borne diseases and improve employee working conditions with our deep cleaning services for ceiling tiles, walls, floors, appliances, fryers, ice machines, meat slicers and other kitchen assets.

      Marble and Stone Restoration

      We restore natural stone floors, including marble, granite, terrazzo and travertine, cleaning off surface dirt and removing etches, wear and scratches.

      Chandelier Cleaning

      To make a dazzling impression on your guests, we’ll encase your chandelier in a protective cocoon, then use compressed air and a mild solution to clean everything—while replacing any burned-out lightbulbs.

      Mattress, TV & Minibar Replacement/Recycling

      We'll remove mattresses and box springs from your guestrooms, load them into trucks and haul them away to recycle and reuse. If possible, then install your new ones. We can take care of other assets, too, such as televisions and minibars. We simplify the entire process for you by handling all steps including logistics.

      Power Washing

      We use high-pressure spray to deep-clean accumulated gunk and chewing gum from exterior pavers, siding, roads and pathways, so the exterior of your venue is as inviting as the interior.

      PTAC/VTAC Cleaning

      We clean the coils, condenser, evaporator, blower wheel, catch pan and wall sleeve, to reduce energy costs, improve performance and leave each room smelling fresh.

      Stain and Odor Removal

      Our proven cleaning process eliminates hard-to treat malodors, and brings nearly ruined carpets back to life, while eradicating wine and coffee stains, and more.

      Drapes and Upholstery Cleaning

      We’ll quickly clean any stains from your draperies and sheers—while they’re still hanging on the rods. And we’ll make your upholstery more hygienic and attractive than ever, removing areas that are stained or have turned gray due to contact with skin oil.

      Vinyl Tile Restoration

      Our process eliminates debris from foot traffic and pushcart wheels by removing old floor wax and installing a new coat, leaving a clean and shiny, like-new vinyl floor for your back-office employees. 

      Disinfecting Electrostatic Spraying

      We utilize best-in-class electrostatic spray technology to efficiently and effectively apply disinfectant to all surfaces, even those you can’t see.

      Laundry and Trash Chute Inspecting and Cleaning

      Keep your garbage and linens moving by having us inspect your chute systems—end to end—then deep-clean and repair any issues we find.

      Escalator Cleaning

      We’ll deep clean the treads, risers and handrails and also provide ongoing maintenance cleaning for these heavily trafficked assets, getting rid of accumulated oil and grease, avoiding costly repairs, reducing downtime and improving longevity and attractiveness.

      Smoking, Pet and
      Cooking Room Treatment

      We’ll eliminate all hard-to-treat malodors from in-room cooking, remove all residual odors left by smokers and use the latest enzyme treatments to break down and destroy pet urine stenches.

      Additional Services

      High Dusting
      Flood Clean-Up
      Rubber Floor Cleaning
      Parking Garage Deck Cleaning
      Airwall and Cubicle Cleaning
      Graffiti Removal
